blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a fair distribution algorithm.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a fair distribution algorithm, which is crucial for ensuring that the same person is not always asked to cover classes. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or data that demonstrate how the algorithm operates or if it has been implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for this algorithm but lacks concrete evidence of its functionality, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
